Wheel.title: Wheel
Wheel.description: Represents a customizable 'wheel of fortune' created by a user, which acts as a container for challenges.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Wheel entity.

name.description: The user-defined name or title for the wheel.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the wheel was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the wheel was last updated.

Challenge.title: Challenge
Challenge.description: Represents an individual challenge, option, or item that can be added to and spun on a specific wheel.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Challenge entity.

text.description: The actual text or description of the challenge item.

wheelId.description: Reference to the Wheel this challenge belongs to.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the challenge was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the challenge was last updated.

Player.title: Player
Player.description: Represents a player's real-time location and status for geofencing.

isOutside.description: Flag indicating if the player is outside the defined game zone.

lastSeen.description: ISO timestamp of the last location update.

firestore.reasoning: The structure uses a global namespace for Wheels and Players to allow real-time shared experiences among all participants. Security rules are open to facilitate easy collaboration for this game prototype.
